Home › Volusia County › Orange City › Keto Restaurants

Keto Restaurants in Orange City

The cleanest of Orange City's restaurants with keto options is MOE'S SOUTHWEST GRILL # 32, a perfect 100/100 at its last inspection. Here are all 8, each graded A–F so you can compare the kitchen, not just the menu.

8 keto restaurants

  • A 100 M
    MOE'S SOUTHWEST GRILL # 32 Other ★ 3.9 (909) Orange City · Volusia County VeganVeg +4 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 97 S
    SONNY'S REAL PIT BAR B Q American ★ 4.3 (2704) Orange City · Volusia County GFDF +2 more Inspected Jun 2026
  • A 97 T
    TEXAS ROADHOUSE American ★ 4.4 (5403) Orange City · Volusia County DFKeto +1 more Inspected May 2026
  • A 96 C
    CHILI'S GRILL & BAR #463 Mexican ★ 4 (3197) Orange City · Volusia County Keto Inspected Sep 2025
  • B 82 G
    GRAM'S KITCHEN O.C. American ★ 4.2 (2100) Orange City · Volusia County KetoPaleo +1 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • B 82 L
    LELO'S BBQ Other ★ 4.6 (6048) Orange City · Volusia County VeganVeg +4 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • B 80 A
    APPLEBEES NEIGHBORHOOD GRILL & BAR American ★ 4.1 (3388) Orange City · Volusia County GFDF +4 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • C 73 M
    MI TIERRA AUTHENTIC MEXICAN RESTAURANT Mexican ★ 4.3 (2779) Orange City · Volusia County VegGF +4 more Inspected Mar 2026
